text.message: Red what did I do to you
Just weird move to exclusively Rob the person you already plowed who is in last place
Blue is strong but red robs me 3x in a row?
yeah, cause u robbed me my lumber yo make a move
After you robbed me twice in a row
no dude, no one is going to trade u
it is almost gg with trade
Black doesn’t even need sheep what a block
they already got all the wheat
doesnt make sense to block that
Seems like that ore will help them win the game maybe
